_shape: wide: one record per date, one column per instrument (log-returns). Matches market_data_hub.extract.extract_returns's real output (a DatetimeIndex + one column per symbol) reduced to records; validated by reconstructing a DatetimeIndex-ed DataFrame from `rows` and calling market_data_hub.lazydatacore.validate_wide_prices, which is structural (DatetimeIndex, sorted, non-empty-or-empty) and return/price-agnostic.
